text.title: decision-tree-tech-stack Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for decision-tree-tech-stack. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: When team expertise exists for an option, it MUST receive a weight of at least 25% in the decision matrix. If the team-preferred option scores within 0.5 points of the top-scoring option, prefer the team-familiar option and document the trade-off.
rule.rationale: Retraining cost and hiring friction are real costs that decision matrices undercount. A 0.5-point performance advantage does not justify 3-6 months of team ramp-up time on a new stack.
